evidence_refs: WM-4: QuickSubtaskForm — per-row checkboxes allow selecting one or more subtasks; 'Copy N' button calls subtaskClipboard.copy(selected) (no generation re-run — copies label/estimatedMinutes/definitionId/specs/fields verbatim). 'Paste N' button calls subtaskClipboard.paste() and appends cloned subtasks (new IDs, same taskId) — appended, not overwritten, satisfying no-blind-overwrite constraint. subtaskClipboard.ts is the shared module-level clipboard. Distinct from REQ-SBC-DUP-001 (card-level): operates on Subtask instances inside a Task, not on shared builder cards.
